seoTitle: Kayena vs Kellevie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kayena and Kellevie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kayena and Kellevie.
heading: Kayena vs Kellevie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kayena, Tasmania and Kellevie, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kellevie has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Kayena (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kayena or Kellevie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kayena has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Kellevie scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kayena scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Kellevie scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kayena or Kellevie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kellevie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
